org.moeaframework.analysis.diagnostics.ResultPlot

Package
Description
org.moeaframework.analysis.diagnostics
Diagnostic tool for analyzing the runtime behavior of algorithms.

  • Uses of ResultPlot in org.moeaframework.analysis.diagnostics

    Subclasses of ResultPlot in org.moeaframework.analysis.diagnostics
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ApproximationSetPlot
    Displays the end-of-run Pareto approximation set.
    class 
    EmptyPlot
    Placeholder in a layout for unoccupied grid locations.
    class 
    LinePlot
    Displays a line plot of the runtime dynamics of a metric, displaying the 25, 50, and 75-th quantiles.
